changes: Day 37 evening update: Iran fired new missile/drone salvos at Israel + Gulf states in retaliation for US bridge strikes. Trump claims '3 big Iranian bridges' destroyed. Brent surged ~$108-112. UN Hormuz vote delayed to Sat Apr 5 (Good Friday). Bahrain resolution authorizes 'all defensive means necessary' for 6+ months — China/France/Russia broke silence procedure opposing. Added Aster Chemicals & Energy (Singapore) FM declaration (fm-029). Added Shell-CNOOC Huizhou cracker shutdown (sd-027) and Lotte Chemical Yeosu shutdown (sd-026). Updated Brent price range across all country summaries. Iran continues ~25 missiles + ~120 drones/day at Gulf. >1,900 killed in Iran since war began.
newEvents: Iran fired new missile salvos at Israel + Gulf states Apr 3 in retaliation for B1 bridge strikes — PBS, NBC News, Manila Times
Trump claims US destroyed '3 big Iranian bridges' (beyond B1 Karaj alone) — ABC7
Bahrain revised UN Hormuz resolution: 'all defensive means necessary' for 6+ months; China/France/Russia broke silence procedure — Al-Monitor, Washington Post, The National
Iran continues ~25 missiles + ~120 drones/day at Gulf states; >1,900 killed in Iran since war began — NBC News
Brent surged to ~$108-112 on Apr 3 after bridge strikes and Iran retaliation; WTI ~$107 — CNBC, OilPrice.com
newFMDeclarations: fm-029: Aster Chemicals & Energy (Singapore) — FM on ethylene (1.15 Mtpa), propylene (500k tpa), benzene (290k tpa), styrene monomer; declared 6 Mar 2026 — OE Digital, ICIS, S&P Global
newShutdowns: sd-027: Shell-CNOOC (CSPC) Huizhou 1.2M tpa ethylene cracker — shut 5 Mar due to ME naphtha disruption — Hydrocarbon Processing, TankTerminals
sd-026: Lotte Chemical Yeosu — all facilities halted 27 Mar (restart May 29) after S. Korea naphtha export ban — Seoul Economic Daily, ICIS
